prerequisites: A Productive account with access to the organization whose data you want to sync.
A personal access token generated in Productive under Settings > API integrations. Choose Read-only access, which is sufficient for syncing data.
Your Productive organization ID, sent on every request as the X-Organization-Id header (the organization_id config field).

authMethods.name: API key (personal access token)
authMethods.summary: Productive authenticates each request with a personal access token sent in the X-Auth-Token header (the connector's api_key secret field), together with the organization ID in the X-Organization-Id header. Generate the token in Settings > API integrations. Changing your password invalidates existing tokens, and deactivating the user automatically deactivates the token. The API is limited to 100 queries per 10 seconds.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal access token
setupSteps.body: In Productive, go to Settings > API integrations and choose Generate new token. Pick Read-only access, which is sufficient for syncing. Hover over the token name to reveal and copy its value. This value becomes the api_key field. Note that changing your password later will invalidate the token and require generating a new one.

setupSteps.title: Find your organization ID
setupSteps.body: Determine the ID of your Productive organization. This is sent on every request as the X-Organization-Id header and populates the organization_id config field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the personal access token in the api_key field and the organization ID in the organization_id field. The connector sends the token as the X-Auth-Token header and the organization ID as the X-Organization-Id header on each request to the Productive API.

sources.title: API access with personal access tokens - Productive Help Center
